name: pi-session-manager
description: Polished Pi session manager overlay for browsing, searching, resuming, renaming, and safely deleting sessions.

settings.label: Enable session manager
settings.description: Register the /sessions overlay, status badge, and optional shortcut. Disable and reload to leave Pi's built-in /resume unchanged.

settings.label: Manager shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens /sessions when Pi is idle. Set to none to disable.

settings.label: Default scope
settings.description: Initial session scope for /sessions without arguments.

settings.label: Default sort
settings.description: Initial sort mode: threaded follows Pi /resume lineage, recent sorts by activity, relevance sorts search matches by score.

settings.label: Visible rows
settings.description: Maximum session rows shown before scrolling.

settings.label: Overlay width
settings.description: Preferred session manager overlay width in terminal columns.

settings.label: Show session status badge
settings.description: Show the active session name in Pi's footer/status area when the session has a friendly name.

settings.label: Use trash for delete
settings.description: Try the trash CLI before permanently unlinking a deleted session file.
